understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to progress through all levels of the KA59 puzzle by maneuvering selectable pieces to push objects onto goal tiles marked with '+', ultimately achieving a WIN condition for each level to complete the entire game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the selected piece by one cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction, potentially pushing adjacent pushable objects if they are in the way; walls block movement and must be navigated around, while selection is handled by the CLICK action to switch to another selectable piece using exact pixel coordinates.
